answers.question: List of scenarios
answers.notes: The document is a one-page exemption notice letter from IAG to the NZ Registrar of Financial Service Providers. It contains no climate scenario analysis whatsoever.

answers.question: Global temperature outcome by 2100
answers.notes: The document is a one-page exemption notice letter with no climate scenario or temperature content.

answers.question: Scenario provider
answers.notes: The document is a one-page exemption notice letter with no scenario provider information.

answers.question: Pick-and-mix of SSPs and RCPs
answers.notes: The document is a one-page exemption notice letter with no SSP or RCP references.

answers.question: Customised scenarios
answers.notes: The document is a one-page exemption notice letter with no scenario customisation information.

answers.question: Co-produced climate scenarios
answers.notes: The document is a one-page exemption notice letter with no participatory or co-produced scenario development content.

answers.question: Baseline scenarios
answers.notes: The document is a one-page exemption notice letter with no baseline or reference scenario content.

answers.question: Model used
answers.notes: The document is a one-page exemption notice letter with no climate or economic model references.

answers.question: Damage from acute physical risk considered
answers.notes: The document is a one-page exemption notice letter with no physical risk or damage estimates.

answers.question: Non-temperature variables in scenarios
answers.notes: The document is a one-page exemption notice letter with no scenario variables of any kind.

answers.question: Scale of scenarios
answers.notes: The document is a one-page exemption notice letter with no scenario scale information.

answers.question: Time frames
answers.notes: The document is a one-page exemption notice letter with no time horizon or risk period information.

answers.question: Justification for scenario/model choice
answers.notes: The document is a one-page exemption notice letter with no scenario or model justification.
